meta.name: AE
meta.desc:
A.E. es un juego inspirado en Space Invaders con una vista 3D.
En A.E., la tierra está siendo atacada por enjambres de alienígenas que lanzan bomba tras bomba, y tu trabajo es defender el planeta Tierra.
Controlas un cañón láser que se mueve horizontalmente en la parte inferior de la pantalla. ¡Para ganar puntos deberías disparar a todas las fuerzas alienígenas antes de que te disparen!
El juego se vuelve más desafiante cuando progresas, el enjambre alienígena se divide y te ataca desde varios lados.

meta.name: Adventureland
meta.desc:
Adventureland es la primera de las aventuras basadas en texto de Scott Adams. Mediante sencillos comandos de dos palabras, exploras un mundo encantado, resuelves puzles e intentas recuperar 13 tesoros perdidos.
La pantalla del juego se diferencia de la de otros juegos de aventuras en que está dividida en dos "ventanas": en la parte superior se muestra la descripción de la habitación, las salidas, etc., mientras que en la parte inferior se introducen comandos.

meta.name: Amidar
meta.desc:
Amidar es un juego tipo Pac-Man. El objetivo del juego es colorear los rectángulos que aparecen en la pantalla, evitando a los enemigos (Amidars). El juego ofrece tres saltos sobre los enemigos, para evitar situaciones comprometidas. Completar los rectángulos de las esquinas permite "cazar" a los enemigos.
El juego diferencia pantallas pares e impares:
- Impares: Se controla un gorila y los enemigos son soldados. Hay que acabar con todos los puntos. Los rectángulos se colorean cuando se han eliminado todos los puntos del rectángulo.
- Pares: Se controla una brocha y los enemigos son cerdos. Para colorear un rectángulo, hay que recorrer su perímetro en un solo recorrido.
- También existen pantallas de bonus.

meta.name: Ape Escape
meta.desc: El jugador controla a un pequeño personaje que se mueve lateralmente en la parte inferior de la pantalla y dispara verticalmente hacia arriba. Un gran gorila se sienta en la cima de un edificio alto en el centro de la pantalla. El gorila arroja ladrillos desde el tejado al mismo tiempo que los helicópteros lanzan bombas y roban ladrillos de los lados de la torre. El jugador comienza con 3 vidas y pierde una vida si es golpeado por escombros del edificio o fuego de helicóptero. A medida que se roban ladrillos, la torre comienza a caer. Si la torre cae demasiado, el gorila saltará y golpeará al jugador. Si el jugador es golpeado por escombros 3 veces, se acaba el juego.

meta.name: Ape Escape
meta.desc: El jugador controla a un pequeño personaje que se mueve lateralmente en la parte inferior de la pantalla y dispara verticalmente hacia arriba. Un gran gorila se sienta en la cima de un edificio alto en el centro de la pantalla. Si la torre cae demasiado, el gorila saltará y golpeará al jugador. Si el jugador es golpeado por escombros 3 veces, se acaba el juego.

meta.name: Apple Panic
meta.desc:
You control a digger, armed with his shovel, and you must kill your opponents - the evil legged apples.
Your character can only walk left/right and climb up/down the ladders - no jumping - and if the apples touch you, you'll lose.
To kill an apple you must dig a hole on the ground and wait for one of them to get stuck on it. Then you must hit it with your shovel to make it fall to the level below. The apples die if they fall deep enough. Depending on their color, they may require from 1 to 3-level falls, so you may have to dig several aligned holes. Besides, the deeper the fall, the higher you score.
Each level is timed so you must take out all the apples quickly, or you'll lose. If you're successful, the next levels will feature more and more enemies than the previous one.

meta.name: Arachnoid
meta.desc: Arachnoid is a fixed screen shoot 'em up where the player takes control of a spider that has to defend its eggs from hostile ants. The game is most similar to Centipede. The ants attack in rows, moving horizontally one line at a time until they get to the player who moves around in the lower sections of the screen. Unlike Centipede there are no obstacles when starting out, but as the player shoots his web at the ants a wall of webbing is created. These causes the ants to change their direction. In addition to ants there are gnats and flies that can carry ants and open up passages in the wall. There are also wasps that moves across the screen at times. The game goes on until the eggs hatch or they have all been taken by the ants. Once the eggs hatch the player moves on to a new and tougher level.

meta.name: Arcadia
meta.desc: Arcadia es un juego de disparos fijo al estilo Space Invaders que también toma elementos de Gorf y Galaxian para crear un juego de acción simple y rápido. El jugador controla una nave espacial mientras los alienígenas se desplazan y se mueven libremente por la pantalla hacia abajo. El juego consta de 12 niveles diferentes de alienígenas descendentes.

meta.name: Artillery Duel
meta.desc: En este juego para dos jugadores, cada jugador controla un cañón de artillería ubicado en un paisaje montañoso con el objetivo de destruir al otro jugador. Los jugadores se turnan para dispararse; en cada turno, tienes una cantidad limitada de tiempo en la que se puede configurar el ángulo del cañón y el nivel de pólvora para controlar la dirección y la distancia del disparo. Al decidir tu disparo, deberás tener en cuenta las condiciones actuales, que incluyen la velocidad/dirección del viento y cualquier montaña que pueda interponerse en tu camino. Destruir con éxito el cañón de tu oponente te otorgará un punto, y el primer jugador en alcanzar el número de puntos establecido gana la partida. Hay varios niveles de habilidad disponibles que establecen la cantidad de tiempo que tienes para realizar un disparo.

meta.name: Astroblitz
meta.desc: Un clon de Defender, excepto por el hecho de que no tienes que rescatar a nadie... simplemente dispara a todo en la pantalla y serás teletransportado automáticamente al siguiente nivel.

meta.name: Astroblitz
meta.desc: Un clon de Defender, excepto por el hecho de que no tienes que rescatar a nadie... simplemente dispara a todo en la pantalla y serás teletransportado automáticamente al siguiente nivel.

meta.name: Atlantis
meta.desc: ¡La ciudad perdida de la Atlántida está siendo atacada! Ola tras ola de naves Gorgon se acercan, cada una armada con armas capaces de destruir una parte de la ciudad. Estás a cargo de los puestos de mando en los límites de la ciudad y necesitas defenderla de los invasores. Las diversas naves Gorgon seguirán volando en la pantalla en cantidades variables y con diferentes patrones de vuelo. Al principio vuelan alto en el cielo, pero luego progresivamente más bajo. Si un enemigo llega lo suficientemente bajo antes de que lo destruyas, usará sus armas y destruirá uno de los edificios de la Atlántida. A medida que avanzas en el juego, la velocidad de las naves enemigas seguirá aumentando. El juego termina cuando todos los edificios restantes de la ciudad han sido destruidos.

meta.name: Atlantis
meta.desc: ¡La ciudad perdida de la Atlántida está siendo atacada! Ola tras ola de naves Gorgon se acercan, cada una armada con armas capaces de destruir una parte de la ciudad. meta.name: Attack of the Mutant Camels
meta.desc: El jugador controla una pequeña nave y tiene la tarea de matar los camellos amarillos gigantes antes de que lleguen a la base de operaciones, requiere de varias docenas de disparos. Los camellos pueden contraatacar disparando bolas de fuego por la boca. Si un camello llega a la base, se pierde el juego. Una vez que todos los camellos de un nivel mueren, el jugador tiene que sobrevivir a una secuencia de "hiperespacio" que requiere evitar los misiles de alta velocidad. Una vez completado con éxito, el siguiente nivel presenta una nueva ola de camellos, con un juego un poco más difícil.

meta.name: Avenger
meta.desc: Avenger es un clon de Space Invaders para el Commodore VIC-20. Cartucho con número de catálogo VIC-1901.

meta.name: Bandits
meta.desc: Tu trabajo es custodiar los suministros en la base lunar. Bandidos de varios tipos llegan en oleadas y descienden, tratando de apoderarse de los bienes. Armado con un cañón láser móvil y algo de escudo, obtienes puntos al hacer explotar a los bandidos. Bandits tiene 28 niveles de juego. Comienzas con 5 naves y adquieres una nave extra por cada 5,000 puntos. El juego es similar a Space Invaders.

meta.name: Black Hole
meta.desc: Tu nave espacial ha sido atrapada por la atracción gravitacional de un agujero negro. Puedes rotar 360 grados, volar hacia adelante y disparar tus cañones, pero la atracción gravitacional del agujero negro continuará atrayéndote hacia el centro de la pantalla y la muerte. El jugador obtiene puntos por disparar a las rocas espaciales que flotan en la pantalla. El jugador comienza con 3 vidas.

meta.name: Black Hole
meta.desc: Tu nave espacial ha sido atrapada por la atracción gravitacional de un agujero negro. Puedes rotar 360 grados, volar hacia adelante y disparar tus cañones, pero la atracción gravitacional del agujero negro continuará atrayéndote hacia el centro de la pantalla y la muerte. El jugador obtiene puntos por disparar a las rocas espaciales que flotan en la pantalla. El jugador comienza con 3 vidas.

meta.name: Buck Rogers : Planet Of Zoom
meta.desc: Buck Rogers: Planet of Zoom es una carrera de obstáculos de ciencia ficción para un solo jugador, donde el jugador controla la nave espacial de Buck Rogers y debe guiarla a través de múltiples pares de pilones a lo largo del juego. Controlar la nave implica desplazarse lateralmente a izquierda o derecha, detenerse, avanzar (y más rápido) y retroceder/frenar (y más lento). Además, la nave espacial también puede disparar su arma para liberar un par de rayos de energía.

meta.name: Bug Crusher
meta.desc: The player controls a small spaceship that can move in all directions, and attempts to destroy bugs that appear on the screen by running into them. The player is safe when in the 3 bunkers at the edge of the screen, but when they exit, they are continuously chased by a red enemy who steals the player's limited fuel. Other enemies scroll continuously across the screen, and if the player hits them or runs out of fuel, they lose a life. The player can activate temporary invulnerability at the cost of fuel. The player starts with 5 lives, and it's game over when all are lost.

meta.name: Cannonball Blitz
meta.desc: The player has to reach the flag on the top. The guard sends the cannonballs down, so you must jump over them. Cannonballs roll on the floors which have hatches, that open randomly. Also cannonballs fall on the swings, so you have to use them for climbing to the upper floor. Finally you must catch the balloon to make your way up to the flag and to the next level. Moving options available are up, down, left, right and jump.

meta.name: Capture the Flag
meta.desc:
The player can choose to be an invader or a defender. The invader must find a way to exit the labyrinth through one of two doors, beyond which lies the flag. Each successful flag capture scores 1 point and resets the maze for another round. The defender can score points by capturing the invader, which is simply done by running into him, thus preventing the invader from reaching the flag.
The two flags (or "doors" as the game calls them) are represented by flashing walls, and when the players see each other they are represented as blue or green moving walls. The music changes dynamically and becomes more intense when the invader and defender are close to each other. After a successful capture of either the flag or the invader, a new labyrinth is randomly generated.

meta.name: Capture the Flag
meta.desc:

The music changes dynamically and becomes more intense when the invader and defender are close to each other. After a successful capture of either the flag or the invader, a new labyrinth is randomly generated.

meta.name: Catcha Snatcha
meta.desc:
In Catcha Snatch, the player takes the role of the store detective Barney Bootlace. He walks around the store, which is represented with one top-down screen, to do his job: guiding lost children back to their mom, bringing lost items to the lost property office, busting shoplifters and rushing bombs out of the door. Practically this boils down to touching the item/person in question and walking to the destination.
Barney's success is measured by his manager's approval from 0 to 99%. The approval rises when Barney manages to handle an issue correctly and decreases when he misses something. If 99% is reached, Barney is promoted to the next level (and a higher difficulty) - however, a demotion and a written warning follows directly after falling to 0%. After three warnings the game is over, but one warning is removed for advancing two levels.

meta.name: Cave-In
meta.desc:
After many years of futility, your search is over!
You have found the kingdom of meese.
Power and riches shall soon be yours!
But remember the legend of meese.
Are there really creature called "Meese-Kites"? Are the "magic lips" still hidden below? Are you brave enough to find out ...

meta.name: Cave-In
meta.desc:

Are there really creature called "Meese-Kites"? Are the "magic lips" still hidden below? Are you brave enough to find out ...

meta.name: Centipede
meta.desc:
In Centipede, the player is trapped in the Enchanted Forest. Armed with only a magic wand to ward off the forest's insect denizens, all of which are attacking the player in continuous waves.
The player must use the magic wand to shoot sparks at approaching insects to score points by pressing the controller button. Holding down the controller button will set the wand to rapid-fire shots. If the player is bitten by an insect, the player will be temporarily paralyzed and lose one of the three starting magic wands.

meta.name: Choplifter
meta.desc:
En Choplifter, el jugador asume el papel de piloto de helicóptero de combate. El jugador tiene que salvar a los rehenes retenidos en barracones en territorio del malvado Imperio Bungeling. El jugador debe recoger a los rehenes y transportarlos de forma segura al edificio cercano del Servicio Postal de EE. UU.
El helicóptero puede moverse en tres direcciones: izquierda, derecha o hacia adelante (frente al jugador). Puede disparar a los enemigos en cualquiera de estas direcciones y no es necesario que vuele en la misma dirección a la que se enfrenta. El modo orientado hacia adelante se usa principalmente para disparar tanques. El jugador debe tener cuidado de proteger a los rehenes del fuego enemigo y evitar matarlos con fuego amigo.

meta.name: Choplifter
meta.desc:

meta.name: Chuck Norris Superkicks
meta.desc: In this action game you play the part of Chuck Norris on a quest to reach a monastery where an important leader is kept hostage. The game consists of several different screens: when beginning and between fights you will see a view of the path that leads to the monastery. Walking along the path, you will encounter numerous enemies. When fighting, the view switches to a close up of your current location. By pressing the joystick button and moving the joystick in one of four directions you can perform various kicks, punches, and blocks. The enemies you encounter are varied, and some can only be defeated by certain moves. The path you walk along will occasionally split up into two or more choices; when this happens, only one choice is correct and the others are dead ends. If you choose incorrectly, you'll have to back track a bit and try again.

meta.name: Computer War
meta.desc: It's thermonuclear war! Break the computer code to launch your missiles, then guide your interceptors before enemy missiles converge with your cities. This is a game in two parts. The first part plays a lot like a sliding block puzzle. You are given a figure in a 3 x 3 grid to match. Using the joystick and fire button, you rotate pieces in a larger grid to try to match the smaller figure. If you do that, you can select a missile launch site. Eventually, the enemy will launch its own missiles. You position your crosshair at the radar dot for the enemy missile, and can then launch an intercepter. This part of the game is more action-oriented as you "fly" your intercepter to take down the enemy nuke.

meta.name: Congo Bongo
meta.desc: El jugador asume el papel de un explorador pelirrojo de safari que intenta atrapar a un simio llamado "Bongo". El explorador busca a Bongo para vengarse de una broma en la que Bongo prendió fuego a la tienda del cazador. Debe perseguir al simio a través de cuatro pantallas diferentes, con el objetivo de pasar de la esquina inferior izquierda a la esquina superior derecha de cada pantalla. Debe superar obstáculos como la caída de cocos, la carga de rinocerontes y evitar caídas al agua.

meta.name: Cosmic Cruncher
meta.desc: Manoeuvre your "Cosmic Cruncher" through the Milky Way and "crunch" all the pulsars in each part of the galaxy. 11 challenging levels of play... Over 300 colour/maze combinations. Another exciting Commodore arcade-style action game!

meta.name: Cosmic Cruncher
meta.desc: Manoeuvre your "Cosmic Cruncher" through the Milky Way and "crunch" all the pulsars in each part of the galaxy. 11 challenging levels of play... Over 300 colour/maze combinations. Another exciting Commodore arcade-style action game!

meta.name: Cosmic Cruncher
meta.desc: Manoeuvre your "Cosmic Cruncher" through the Milky Way and "crunch" all the pulsars in each part of the galaxy. 11 challenging levels of play... Over 300 colour/maze combinations. Another exciting Commodore arcade-style action game!

meta.name: Cosmic Jailbreak
meta.desc: Aliens, ovnis e insectos espaciales intentan liberar a los prisioneros de la Cárcel Cósmica... Tú evitas el intento de escape y construyes tus propias bases láser o nuestra Tierra estará condenada... ¡Gráficos emocionantes hacen de este un juego para amantes del espacio de todas las edades!

meta.name: Count, The
meta.desc: You awaken in a sealed wing of the Count's Transylvanian castle, seemingly restrictive but yielding further avenues of secret passages and unexpected exits to the intrepid and timely explorer. Over the course of a few days you need to cultivate a familiarity with the layout of the castle and the nocturnal activities of its primary resident, who chooses to make midnight snacks of you rather than a main course. An unpredictable day/night cycle forces your hand, necessitating finding a reliable light source and some means of staying awake -- or else you awaken the next morning back in bed, your possessions pilfered by the kleptomaniacal creature of the night and your neck boasting irritated bite marks. Each day you must incrementally approach your goal of overcoming the Count, lest you wind up as one more dried-out apéritif.

meta.name: Creepy Corridors
meta.desc: Creepy Corridors is a maze game similar to Wizard of Wor, adventurer Sierra Smith has entered the catacombs of Creepy Corridors in search for treasures. The mazes are full of riches but there are also lots of creatures that will do all they can to protect it. That's not enough to stop this adventurer though and it's up to the player to help him out. Each level consists of four diamonds that the player has to pick up. At the same time he has to avoid getting killed by the monsters that wander around the corridors. To his help he has a gun that he can use to shoot the creatures as they get close. Once all the diamonds have been picked up, an exit will open up that takes the player to the next level. The exit will also open when the player has killed all the monsters before collecting the diamonds. The player has four lives at the start of the game and each time he collects all the diamonds of a level he earns an extra one. More and tougher enemies are encountered as the player progresses through the levels.

meta.name: Crossfire
meta.desc:
In this adaptation of the arcade game Targ your job is to defend your city from marauding alien beasts. You can simultaneously maneuver your craft and shoot in four directions while patrolling the regular grid of streets - the enemy has surrounded your city block, and attacks are coming in from all sides as the aliens swarm in with all guns blazing. To survive, you'll have to blast your way out by darting in and out of the line of fire and taking down the assailants with your own volleys: once they're all eliminated, you go forth to the next level, to face yet another wave.
Ammunition is limited, and from time to time you'll have to restock by picking up a fresh supply. Every level contains four bonus crystals: as time goes by, they emerge one-by-one to be picked up, and each is worth twice as much as the last. The game starts you off with three ships, though you get a fresh one for every 5000 points you score.

meta.name: Cyclon
meta.desc: Cyclon es un juego de reflejos de temática espacial similar a Space Zap de Midway. El objetivo del juego es sobrevivir el mayor tiempo posible defendiendo tu base estelar de cruceros estelares enemigos y satélites mortales. El juego tiene 99 niveles de dificultad, y el jugador puede comenzar en cualquier nivel del 0 al 10. El jugador comienza el juego con tres bases y ganará una adicional cada vez que se complete un nivel. Además, cualquier energía extra restante al final de cada ronda se convertirá en puntos extra. Cuando se han perdido todas las bases estelares del jugador, el juego termina.

meta.name: Deadly Duck
meta.desc: En Deadly Duck, el jugador controla al personaje principal (el pato) que debe disparar sus "balas de pico" a los cangrejos, los ladrillos que estos sueltan y las libélulas. Cada nivel comienza con ocho cangrejos. Los cangrejos agarran ladrillos de los lados e intentan dejarlos caer sobre el pato controlado por el jugador. Es posible disparar a los cangrejos y a los ladrillos mientras caen, pero si un ladrillo cae sobre el pato, este muere. Cuando un ladrillo cae en un lugar vacío, permanecerá en el estanque por un momento, impidiendo que el pato se mueva horizontalmente.

meta.name: Deadly Skies
meta.desc: En Deadly Skies vuelas un helicóptero de ataque contra una serie de instalaciones militares y emplazamientos de misiles antiaéreos. Los controles del joystick te permiten mover tu helicóptero para seguir a los objetivos de abajo o para evitar las crecientes y rápidas andanadas de fuego que te rodean. Los obstáculos que debes superar son asteroides, bombas inteligentes, misiles antiaéreos e incluso OVNIs que trabajan arduamente para destruirte porque se te ha asignado la tarea de eliminar sus bases de misiles.

meta.name: Defender
meta.desc:
Defender put players in charge of a ship sent to protect mankind from wave after wave of attacking alien forces.
Armed with smart bombs and the ability to use hyperspace to move quickly around the planet, the player ship must fight against Bombers, Pods, Swarmers, Baiters, and Landers - that can capture the humanoids and transform them into deadly and relentless Mutants. Fail to save the humanoids from freefall or Mutant transformation, and the planet is destroyed.

meta.name: Demon Attack
meta.desc:
Marooned on the ice planet Krybor, you watch legions of eerie creatures scream overhead.
They hover ominously.
Attack and destroy them - or be destroyed!
Armed with your Laser Cannon, you confront the ultimate challenge: Survive!

meta.name: Demon Attack
meta.desc:
Marooned on the ice planet Krybor, you watch legions of eerie creatures scream overhead.
They hover ominously.
Attack and destroy them - or be destroyed!
Armed with your Laser Cannon, you confront the ultimate challenge: Survive!

meta.name: Dig Dug
meta.desc:
En Dig Dug, libra una guerra subterránea con tu fiel arpón. Tendrás que derrotar al duro Pooka y al feroz Fygar para avanzar al siguiente nivel.
Haz explotar a tus enemigos para que revienten o lánzales rocas. Conseguirás puntos por deshacerte de ellos o por recoger objetos de bonificación.
Este juego clásico es a la vez un juego de acción arcade de la vieja escuela y un juego de estrategia. ¡Atrae a tus enemigos hacia donde quieras que estén y aplástalos con las rocas!

meta.name: Dot Gobbler
meta.desc: Try to gobble up the dots before the hungry ghosts catch you. Gobble one of the large power dots for added strength, and it's your turn to chase the ghouls for extra bonus points. The player starts with 3 lives, and 1 is lost if a ghost catches them. Gobble all the dots, and move on to the next level.

meta.name: Dot Gobbler
meta.desc: Try to gobble up the dots before the hungry ghosts catch you. Gobble one of the large power dots for added strength, and it's your turn to chase the ghouls for extra bonus points. The player starts with 3 lives, and 1 is lost if a ghost catches them. Gobble all the dots, and move on to the next level.

meta.name: Dragonfire
meta.desc: ¡Los tesoros del rey han sido robados! Como joven y audaz príncipe, tu objetivo es recuperarlos a todos. Los tesoros se guardan en diferentes castillos, cada uno custodiado por un dragón de fuego. Cada nivel del juego tiene dos partes, primero tienes que cruzar el puente levadizo del castillo. ¡Tendrás que saltar y esquivar las bolas de fuego de los dragones y evitar las flechas voladoras para llegar al otro lado! En la segunda parte, tienes que recoger todos los tesoros de la pantalla y ponerlos en un lugar seguro mientras evitas al dragón que corre por la parte inferior de la pantalla. Los dragones de cada nivel tienen diferentes patrones de movimiento y disparo, y a medida que avanzan los niveles se vuelven más rápidos y complicados.

meta.name: Droids
meta.desc:
In the vast, starless void beyond the Mnemos Nebula, your desperate struggle has restored some measure of control after the devastating effects of an ion storm. Just creeping along at sublight speed, you discover that your crew of droids has suffered phase inversion to their programming elements. Once friendly, helpful, and benign, they have become an all too real nemesis to your safety and control of the ship.
The player controls a small character who can move in the cardinal directions, and fire in the direction they are facing. When a droid is shot, it dematerializes, and is teleported back to its cubicle. The goal is to repair, and then reactivate all of the ship's systems. The player does this by touching a system, and then returning to the elevator shaft on the left of the screen to repower, and they touch the system again. The player has 3 minutes to reactivate all systems and move to a more challenging level with more or faster moving droids.

meta.name: Face Maker
meta.desc:
Everyone's mothers always say "Don't make those faces! They'll stay like that!" But now you have the chance to make the silliest looking faces anyone's ever seen!
Choose from a wide assortment of eyes, ears, noses, and mouths. Then make your newly created faces blink, wiggle their ears, wink, or razz you. You can even play a "Simon Says.." type game where your face will do some kind of action and you have to follow along!

meta.name: Face Maker
meta.desc:
Everyone's mothers always say "Don't make those faces! They'll stay like that!" But now you have the chance to make the silliest looking faces anyone's ever seen!
Choose from a wide assortment of eyes, ears, noses, and mouths. Then make your newly created faces blink, wiggle their ears, wink, or razz you. You can even play a "Simon Says.." type game where your face will do some kind of action and you have to follow along!

meta.name: Fast Eddie
meta.desc:
As Fast Eddie, you must go from floor to floor, collecting prizes.
Up to two prizes will be on the screen at any one time on any floor but the top one. There are a max of ten prizes per screen. On each floor, a Sneaker stands or roams back and forth. You move to another floor or jump to avoid the Sneakers. On the top floor is High-Top, the tallest Sneaker.
You have to get at least nine prizes. After you get the ninth, High-Top will be low enough to jump over. You then jump over him to get the key above him. Then it is on to the the next screen.
You get ten points for the first prize, twenty for the second, and so on up to ninety points for prizes nine and ten. You don't HAVE to get the tenth prize unless you want the extra ninety points.
After every screen, you get an extra Eddie; up to a maximum of three in reserve.

meta.name: Frogger
meta.desc:
Your task in this arcade game is to guide a frog across a treacherous road and river, and to safety at the top of the screen. Both these sections are fraught with a variety of hazards, each of which will kill the frog and cost you a life if contact is made.
The road is full of cars and trucks, at variable speeds. The river water itself is fatal, as are the snakes which hover within on later levels. Frogger must use the arrangement of logs, turtles (which are only there for a short time) and alligators (but stay away from their faces), and then jump into one of the open home-cells, ideally one containing a fly for extra points. Once all holes have been filled, you move onto the next, harder, level.

meta.name: Fun with Music
meta.desc: The player can review or create their own music selection by setting tempo, value, and notes on a music graph. After they've created their musical composition, they can enter a game where they move a conductor vertically, as they try to follow the horizontally scrolling notes on the screen. If they miss too many notes, or are caught by a chasing dog, they lose a life.

meta.name: Galaxian
meta.desc:
Galaxian is a shoot 'em up where the player is at the bottom of the screen and controls a spaceship called "Galaxip" with the aim of eliminating aliens. The enemies appear in formation at the top of the screen with two escort ships. The player moves left and right to aim at an alien, then shoots a bullet and the alien he meets is killed. The aliens are classified as drones, emissaries, hornets, and commanders, with those higher up the screen scoring more points if destroyed. At set intervals, an enemy moves towards you on the screen and escorts a bomber.The Galaxip can only fire a single shot on the screen and must wait until it reaches the top before it can fire another.
The enemy's movement increases as the game progresses along with the number of shots the enemies fire.

meta.name: Garden Wars
meta.desc: Garden Wars es un shooter de laberinto de 8 direcciones y pantalla única de ritmo rápido, similar a Berzerk. ¿Tu objetivo? Ganar tantos puntos como sea posible disparando y recolectando cosas en un laberinto estático de pantalla fija. Sin embargo, el juego es original debido a la variedad de elementos en pantalla. Hay algunos monstruos a los que debes disparar y que te matarán. Hay elementos intermitentes que debes recoger (solo por puntos); si les disparas accidentalmente (lo que sucederá debido a la velocidad del juego), desaparecerán y reaparecerán en otro lugar.

meta.name: Garden Wars
meta.desc: Garden Wars es un shooter de laberinto de 8 direcciones y pantalla única de ritmo rápido, similar a Berzerk. ¿Tu objetivo? Ganar tantos puntos como sea posible disparando y recolectando cosas en un laberinto estático de pantalla fija. Sin embargo, el juego es original debido a la variedad de elementos en pantalla. Hay algunos monstruos a los que debes disparar y que te matarán. Hay elementos intermitentes que debes recoger (solo por puntos); si les disparas accidentalmente (lo que sucederá debido a la velocidad del juego), desaparecerán y reaparecerán en otro lugar.

meta.name: Ghost Manor
meta.desc: Your friend is trapped inside Ghost Manor! There are five different screens you need to get past before you can rescue your friend from the top floor of the manor. The game begins in the graveyard outside the manor; here you play tag with a friendly rainbow ghost or skeleton which will supply you with spears you can fire at enemies. In the second screen, you approach the guarded entrance of the manor. You need to shoot all of the enemies blocking the entrance. The third and fourth screens take place inside the manor. There is a moving wall on each of these floors which is deadly to the touch, so be careful! The final screen is the top floor of the manor where your friend is being held captive. Dracula guards this floor, and using the crosses you collected earlier you need to repel him into a prison and free your friend. You must complete all of this in four minutes or less! You can play the game as either a boy or a girl, and four different skill levels are available.

meta.name: Gold Fever
meta.desc: Gold Fever! is an action game with platform elements in which the player controls a miner searching for gold. At the beginning of the game the miner is at the uppermost tiers of the mine. Scattered around the five levels of the mine are little piles of gold. The goal is to move towards them and pick them up. To move the miner safely from level to level the player steers him up or down the vertical shafts in the floors. There are complications, such as runaway ore carts, which interfere with the miner's progress by knocking him down. Three collisions and the player is out of miners, ending the game. The miner will be able to jump over the obstructions if the player times the jumps perfectly. This adds from 30 to 40 points to the player's score. If the miner can cross a chasm by running across a boxcar, he earns another 20 points.

meta.name: Gorf
meta.desc: El jugador controla una nave espacial que puede moverse a izquierda, derecha, arriba y abajo alrededor del tercio inferior de la pantalla. La nave puede disparar un solo proyectil (llamado "láser de quark" en este juego), que viaja verticalmente hacia la parte superior de la pantalla. A diferencia de juegos similares, donde el jugador no puede volver a disparar hasta que el proyectil existente haya desaparecido, el jugador puede elegir disparar otro proyectil en cualquier momento; si el proyectil anterior todavía está en pantalla, este desaparece.

meta.name: Gridrunner
meta.desc: El juego es similar al juego de Atari Centipede, en el que el jugador controla una nave verde, la Gridrunner, en la parte inferior y dispara a los enemigos que descienden en zigzag desde la parte superior. El jugador también debe evitar los pulsos emitidos por los X-Y zappers que patrullan los bordes de la cuadrícula. El juego tiene veinte oleadas de enemigos para completar.

meta.name: Gridrunner
meta.desc: El juego es similar al juego de Atari Centipede, en el que el jugador controla una nave verde, la Gridrunner, en la parte inferior y dispara a los enemigos que descienden en zigzag desde la parte superior. El jugador también debe evitar los pulsos emitidos por los X-Y zappers que patrullan los bordes de la cuadrícula. El juego tiene veinte oleadas de enemigos para completar.

meta.name: In The Chips
meta.desc:
A business simulator which puts you in control of a Silicon Valley software firm: you've invested $100,000 in cash in the business, and now you get to call the shots. Your goal is to expand your share of the computer software market while striving against a competing company (run by the computer or by another human player).
Each turn represents a fiscal quarter, and both companies set up a business strategy. This is done by walking your character between the company's various buildings: at R&D, development budget is assigned for up to five potential products (games, judging by their titles). Stock levels are set at Manufacturing, and retail prices are adjusted in the Sales office. Then there's Advertising, which will (literally) reach out its hand for budget.

meta.name: Jawbreaker II
meta.desc:
You have a screen with five horizontal levels. There are dots, candies, if you will, on each level. You must eat all the candies to get a teeth brushing and advance to the next, harder, level. Also on each level are happy faces. They are happy to knock your teeth out, which they will do if you touch them. This will lose you a life. When all lives are lost, the game is over.
On occasion, a lollipop will appear in the center of the maze. This grants extra points. On the four corners are special dots that, when eaten, will change the color of the maze, allowing you to eat the happy faces for a short time. The maze color will change again, briefly, before returning to normal, as a warning. To move from level to level, there are moving openings on the levels. Be careful not to get trapped with a happy face with no way out.

meta.name: Jawbreaker II
meta.desc:
You have a screen with five horizontal levels. There are dots, candies, if you will, on each level. You must eat all the candies to get a teeth brushing and advance to the next, harder, level. Also on each level are happy faces. They are happy to knock your teeth out, which they will do if you touch them. This will lose you a life. When all lives are lost, the game is over.
On occasion, a lollipop will appear in the center of the maze. This grants extra points. On the four corners are special dots that, when eaten, will change the color of the maze, allowing you to eat the happy faces for a short time. The maze color will change again, briefly, before returning to normal, as a warning. To move from level to level, there are moving openings on the levels. Be careful not to get trapped with a happy face with no way out.

meta.name: Jungle Hunt
meta.desc:
Jungle Hunt cuenta con cuatro aventuras únicas, cada una de las cuales se repite con dificultad creciente. Si no sobrevives a estas aventuras, no sólo perderás tu vida, sino también la de la encantadora Penélope, ¡que ha sido capturada por caníbales!
La primera parte pone a prueba tus habilidades de Tarzán: ¿puedes balancearte sobre las lianas sin precipitarte al vacío? La segunda parte te enfrenta a una banda de repugnantes cocodrilos en un caudaloso río. Afortunadamente, tienes un cuchillo para defenderte. En la tercera parte, tendrás que enfrentarte a rocas de diferentes tamaños. Una vez superados todos estos peligros, te queda enfrentarte al temible caníbal, armado con una temible lanza. ¿Serás capaz de derrotarlo y salvar a la bella Penélope?
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: K-razy Antiks
meta.desc: The player controls a white ant, who must infiltrate an enemy ant hill to defeat the other 3 ants. The player and enemy ants have the ability to lay eggs, and if they are killed, they will rehatch with a new egg. If the player is killed when no viable egg is available, it is game over. The goal is to have all 3 enemy ants killed by environmental dangers, while also eliminating the eggs they lay, so that they don't respawn.

meta.name: K-Star Patrol
meta.desc: El objetivo es guiar al escuadrón de 8 naves estelares del jugador a través de 10 sectores bajo control alienígena. El jugador controla una pequeña nave que se mueve verticalmente a la izquierda de la pantalla y dispara hacia la derecha.

meta.name: Kindercomp
meta.desc:
An early learning game for kids aged 3-8. This program is a collection of 6 learning games:
Draw, Scribble, Names, Sequence, Letters and Match.
KinderComp helps children improve their reading and counting skills as well as familiarizing them with the computer keyboard.

meta.name: Lazer Zone
meta.desc: Uno de los shoot'em'ups con su estilo frenético típico, Laser Zone te pone a controlar no uno, sino dos "artilleros de zona" en un campo de juego restringido. Controlado con un solo joystick, mueves un artillero de zona en una pared vertical y otro en la parte inferior. Ola tras ola de bichos malos entran en la zona y deben ser derribados antes de que lleguen a cualquiera de las paredes, donde ninguno de los cañones puede alcanzarlos y avanzan hacia ti.

meta.name: Lode Runner
meta.desc: El emblemático juego Lode Runner ha originado una saga y ha servido de inspiración a innumerables títulos. La acción en estado puro se mezcla con los enrevesados niveles, mientras recoges oro y evitas a los robots enemigos haciendo agujeros en el suelo. Usa la cabeza y tus reflejos para completar los puzles y avanzar a los siguientes.

meta.name: Lunar Leeper
meta.desc:
In this game, you must guide your spaceship around while picking up hostages located on the surface, and bring them to safety. Your task becomes difficult by lunar leepers who leap up and try to grab you or the hostages that are picked up by your ship.
If you approach a hostage while a leeper is nearby, the leeper will keep walking toward them until they are killed. If you are grabbed by a leeper, you lose a life. You can shoot at the leepers, but the catch is that you cannot shoot at them while they are on the surface, and you have limited ammo. You also have limited fuel, and if you are half-empty, you must refill at the gas depot in order to continue.
In between levels, you enter a cavern where you must find a huge floating object. You must then shoot out its core to proceed to the next difficult level.

meta.name: Mastertype
meta.desc: MasterType is an educational game that teaches the player how to type with the keyboard. In the game, the MasterType is a powerful wizard who is helping the player defending his command ship by using his laser-like force. The command ship is stationed in the center of the screen and from each corner of the screen, missiles are launched toward the ship. In each corner of the screen, there is a word and by successfully typing in these words the wizard uses his force to zap the missiles. The command ship has four areas and when an a

meta.name: Medieval Joust
meta.desc: Two armored riders race towards each other with their lances draw. The distance until contact is displayed at the top of the screen. As the riders approach, the opponents appear larger in the displays at bottom of the screen. The player controls their lance, represented by a target on the opponent's screen, while the opponent tracks them with their shield. The goal is to reposition the target to an undefended part of their opponent's body at the time of contact, scoring higher points for a better hit. The computer also scores points for hits on the player. At higher levels the lance target becomes less responsive. The first player to reach 100 points is the victor. The player receives a Vile Varlet score for the number of opponents defeated in a row.

meta.name: Medieval Joust
meta.desc: Two armored riders race towards each other with their lances draw. The distance until contact is displayed at the top of the screen. As the riders approach, the opponents appear larger in the displays at bottom of the screen. The player controls their lance, represented by a target on the opponent's screen, while the opponent tracks them with their shield. meta.name: Menagerie
meta.desc:
Maneuver your flea through swamps where deadly spiders are found.
Bounce it on one of the animals of the menagerie which move for the final race in the desert.

meta.name: Menagerie
meta.desc:
Maneuver your flea through swamps where deadly spiders are found.
Bounce it on one of the animals of the menagerie which move for the final race in the desert.

meta.desc:
Maneuver your flea through swamps where deadly spiders are found.
Bounce it on one of the animals of the menagerie which move for the final race in the desert.

meta.name: Meteor Run
meta.desc: El jugador controla una pequeña nave espacial que puede moverse en todas las direcciones y dispara horizontalmente hacia la derecha. El jugador debe disparar a las naves alienígenas púrpuras que se aproximan mientras evita los asteroides rojos. Un pequeño mapa muestra la ubicación de las naves entrantes. El jugador comienza con 3 naves.

meta.name: Miner 2049er
meta.desc:
You play the part of Bounty Bob, and it is your mission to explore every inch of an abandoned mine. As you walk over floor sections in the mine, the floor will change color. When all of the floor sections have been changed in color, you can move on to the next, more challenging level. To reach all of the floor sections, you will need to figure out how to get there.
You can jump (be careful not to fall too far though, or you will be squished), climb up and down ladders, and use different transportation devices that can be found on the levels (such as an elevator, slides, a springboard, or a cannon). Wandering around the mine are numerous radioactive creatures which get in Bounty Bob's way. Also scattered throughout the mines are various artifacts left behind; if Bounty Bob collects one of these, the creatures will temporarily become vulnerable. If Bounty Bob runs into one of the creatures in this state the creature will be destroyed, but if he runs into a creature while it is glowing Bounty Bob will be destroyed.

meta.name: Mission Impossible
meta.desc: This is adventure #3 in Scott Adam's text adventure series. It takes place in a nuclear power plant. You must race against time to fulfill your mission or the reactor may be doomed. You use one or two word commands to move around and manipulate objects.

meta.name: Mole Attack
meta.desc: Moles pop up from nine holes, and the player has 60 seconds to send them fleeing back underground by bopping them on the head with a hammer.[1] Players can use joystick or the keyboard to position the hammer

meta.name: Mole Attack
meta.desc: Moles pop up from nine holes, and the player has 60 seconds to send them fleeing back underground by bopping them on the head with a hammer.[1] Players can use joystick or the keyboard to position the hammer

meta.name: Moon Patrol
meta.desc: El jugador asume el papel de un oficial de policía de Luna City asignado al Sector Nueve, el hogar de los "rufianes más duros de la galaxia". El jugador controla un buggy lunar que viaja sobre la superficie de la Luna, viéndola de lado mientras se mueve hacia el lado derecho de la pantalla. Mientras lo conduce, se deben evitar obstáculos como cráteres y minas, y se deben derribar varios enemigos, como OVNIs desde arriba y tanques en el suelo.

meta.name: Mosquito Infestation
meta.desc: The player moves a can of bug spray on the screen, and tries to kill mosquitoes before they reach their arm. If a mosquito makes it to the arm, the player's blood pressure begins to drop. The player has limited bug spray in their can, and must refill from the tube in the center of the screen. If the blood pressure drops too low, it's game over.

meta.name: Motocross Racer
meta.desc: Motocross Racer is a bike racing game where you need to race through three different scenes in the shortest amount of time possible. Each scene takes place in a different location with a different perspective. First you will race through the desert with a 3-D behind the bike point of view. Rocks, cacti, scorpions, and other obstacles should be avoided or you'll crash and lose valuable time. Next you'll race a winding path uphill through the woods. This section has a top down view, and you'll lose time if you wander off the track or crash into obstacles. The final segment of the race takes place on the beach with a side scrolling point of view. Various obstacles and other racers will all get in your way here! If you crash too many times, or take too long the game will be over.

meta.name: Mountain King
meta.desc: Deep within a multi platformed diamond mine is a valuable crown. Your goal is to locate and retrieve the crown, then make it to the top of the mine alive! There are several steps that need to be completed before you can retrieve the crown. First you need to collect enough diamonds to earn 1,000 points. After you have enough points, you need to locate the flame spirit which is hidden somewhere within the mine. Since the mine is rather dark, you carry a flashlight with you which can be used to locate objects (such as treasure chests full of diamonds and the flame spirit.) Once you have the flame spirit, you need to find the entrance to the temple the crown is in. Offer the flame spirit to the skull spirit guarding the entrance, and you can get in and take the crown. Once you have the crown, you need to make it to the top of the mine before time runs out. To make this task more challenging, numerous cave bats fly around which can steal the crown. If this happens, you need to begin again!

meta.name: Ms. Pac-Man
meta.desc:
In 1982, a sequel to Pac-Man was introduced in the form of his girlfriend, Ms. Pac-Man. This sequel continued on the original gameplay, but added new features to keep the title fresh.
Ms. Pac-Man attempts to clear four various and challenging mazes filled with dots and ever-moving bouncing fruit while avoiding Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Sue. One touch from any of these ghosts means a loss of life for Ms. Pac-Man.
Ms. Pac-Man can turn the tables on her pursuers by eating one of the four Energizers located within the maze. During this time, the ghosts turn blue, and Ms. Pac-Man can eat them for bonus points. The Energizer power only lasts for a limited amount of time, as the ghost's eyes float back to their center box, and regenerate to chase after Ms. Pac-Man again.
Survive a few rounds of gameplay, and the player will be treated to humorous intermissions showing the growing romantic relationship between Pac-Man and Ms. Pac-Man, leading all the way up to the arrival of "Junior".

meta.name: Mutant Herd
meta.desc:
Mutant Herd starts like an usual arcade game: a powerhouse in the middle screen, monsters which want to destroy it and two laser beams (one horizontally and one vertically) at the player's disposal. Those laser beams act more like moveable walls because they don't destroy monsters, but push them back. They disappear for good when they are pushed outside the screen, but retaliation swiftly comes from the other side. The end goal is to destroy the monster queen's burrow to stop the attacks.
Besides monsters, there is also a friendly creature on the screen: the monster slayer. It must be guided towards the burrow entrances with the laser beams. Then the screen changes to a side view: a big ladder which leads to eight horizontal levels. The player controls the monster slayer directly towards the lower floor and needs to plant a bomb to destroy five monster eggs while avoiding falling rocks and the monster queen which moves around the levels.

meta.name: Mutant Herd
meta.desc:
Mutant Herd starts like an usual arcade game: a powerhouse in the middle screen, monsters which want to destroy it and two laser beams (one horizontally and one vertically) at the player's disposal. Those laser beams act more like moveable walls because they don't destroy monsters, but push them back. They disappear for good when they are pushed outside the screen, but retaliation swiftly comes from the other side. The end goal is to destroy the monster queen's burrow to stop the attacks.

The player controls the monster slayer directly towards the lower floor and needs to plant a bomb to destroy five monster eggs while avoiding falling rocks and the monster queen which moves around the levels.

meta.name: Number Crunch
meta.desc: The player controls the Counterpillar, who attempts to eat numbers and math symbols while avoiding bombs. The goal is to complete the math equations displayed at the bottom of the screen. The player can be hit by 3 bombs before it's game over.

meta.name: Number Nabber & Shape Grabber
meta.desc: The player controls a small character with a long prehensile tongue that burrows about underground trying to grab numbers or shapes. The goal is to complete mathematical formulas or create similar shapes as shown at the top of the screen. Each number, shape, or operation caught is individually placed in a slot at the top of the screen. Once the two sides balance, the player eats an 'equals' sign to complete the problem. A small monster moves about the screen that will send the player back to the center of the screen if it catches the player. Both Number Nabber and Shape Grabber have four levels of difficulty.

meta.name: Omega Race
meta.desc: The Omegans, the most feared and respected star warriors throughout the galaxy, have come to Earth to challenge you to their legendary OMEGA RACE! Grab hold of your Booster-Grip and speed your Fighter around the perimeters of the mysterious cosmic arena. Ricochet off walls to outmaneuver and vaporize Omegan Droid Ships and Command Ships and avoid the deadly Photon Mines. Endurance, skill and luck are what you'll need to clear the arena and destroy the madly-spinning Death Ship! But don't get too confident, hotshot. The Omegans waste no time in sending new challenges your way. This is one race that never ends!

meta.name: Pac-Man
meta.desc:
One of the most popular and influential games of the 1980's, Pac-Man stars a little, yellow dot-muncher who works his way around to clear a maze of the various dots and fruit which inhabit the board.
Pac-Man's goal is continually challenged by four ghosts: The shy blue ghost Bashful ("Inky"), the trailing red ghost Shadow ("Blinky"), the fast pink ghost Speedy ("Pinky"), and the forgetful orange ghost Pokey ("Clyde"). One touch from any of these ghosts means loss of a life for Pac-Man.
Pac-Man can turn the tables on his pursuers by eating one of the four Power-Pills located around the maze. During this time, the ghosts turn blue, and Pac-Man can eat them for bonus points. This only lasts for a limited amount of time as the ghosts' eyes float back to their center box and regenerate to chase after Pac-Man again.
Survive a few rounds of gameplay, and be treated to humorous intermissions starring Pac-Man and the ghosts

One of the most popular and influential games of the 1980's, Pac-Man stars a little, yellow dot-muncher who works his way around to clear a maze of the various dots and fruit which inhabit the board.
Pac-Man's goal is continually challenged by four ghosts: The shy blue ghost Bashful ("Inky"), the trailing red ghost Shadow ("Blinky"), the fast pink ghost Speedy ("Pinky"), and the forgetful orange ghost Pokey ("Clyde"). One touch from any of these ghosts means loss of a life for Pac-Man.
Pac-Man can turn the tables on his pursuers by eating one of the four Power-Pills located around the maze. During this time, the ghosts turn blue, and Pac-Man can eat them for bonus points. This only lasts for a limited amount of time as the ghosts' eyes float back to their center box and regenerate to chase after Pac-Man again.
Survive a few rounds of gameplay, and be treated to humorous intermissions starring Pac-Man and the ghosts

meta.name: Pinball Spectacular
meta.desc: The flipper simulation is a mixture of pinball and breakout. The square-cut ball is rolled over the pinball table with the help of a double board similar to Breakout. As pinball elements, there are -next to walls- also two bumpers (upper right and left), the Commodore logo (in the middle of the screen), the light C O M M O D O R E with the corresponding targets, two spinners, four sideways ball traps (middle and bottom) and a point display. Furthermore, there is a time-sensitive ball barrier to avoid the ball going into out. The overview line with ball display, active player and points is in the first line of the screen. You have 3 balls per game.

meta.name: Pipes
meta.desc:
Your mission is to figure out the shortest, most economical way to get the neighborhood hooked up to the water supply system. Decide what kind of pipe to buy and where to put it. Remember that your budget is limited so you don't have much margin for errors.
You can choose the amount of houses you try to hook up to the system from 1 (easiest) to 5 (hardest).

meta.name: Pirate Cove
meta.desc:
"Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum..." You'll meet up with the pirate and his daffy bird, and encounter many strange sights as you attempt to go from your London flat to Treasure Island. 
Can you recover Long John Silver's lost treasures?

meta.name: Polaris
meta.desc: Eres el comandante de un submarino nuclear clase Polaris. Tu misión es defender a tu país del ataque enemigo. Debes enfrentarte a uno o tres submarinos enemigos y a uno o cinco bombarderos en un escuadrón. Debes destruir los bombarderos disparando misiles. Después de destruir el escuadrón de bombarderos, debes enfrentarte a un bombardero en picado que lanza torpedos que se sumergen a tu profundidad y luego se mueven horizontalmente. Después de destruirlo, debes navegar por un canal, evitando o torpedeando minas para alcanzar el siguiente nivel. Ocasionalmente, un destructor enemigo se moverá a través de la pantalla y lanzará una carga de profundidad.

meta.name: Pole Position
meta.desc: Pole Position is a Formula 1 racing game. Enter the Grand Prix, race against other racing cars to achieve the highest score possible in the shortest amount of time.nnnnBefore the player can enter the Grand Prix, the player must first qualify by competing in the Qualifying Lap within 73 seconds or less. If the player, however, does not qualify in the Qualifying Lap, the player may continue to race until the Race Timer runs after 90 seconds. The player will score 50 points per 5 meters and additionally 50 points for every racing car passed. When the time runs out - Game Over. The player will have to restart the Qualifying Lap.

meta.name: Q-Bert
meta.desc: Q*bert es un videojuego de plataformas con gráficos en dos dimensiones. El objetivo es cambiar el color de todos los cubos de una pirámide haciendo que el protagonista salte encima de cada cubo mientras evita obstáculos y enemigos. Los jugadores usan un joystick para controlar el personaje.

meta.name: Quackers
meta.desc: ¡Apunten! ¡Apunten! ¡Toda la diversión de la feria! El objetivo de este juego es matar cuatro líneas de objetivos que consisten en invasores espaciales, conejos y patos antes de que se acabe el tiempo. Además, debes matar melones que están detrás de una pared de ladrillos en movimiento, y debes disparar a través de los huecos en la pared para alcanzarlos. Tienes tiempo limitado, por lo que debes matarlos a todos rápidamente o perderás una de tus cuatro vidas. Una vez que hayas disparado a todos los objetivos, serás obsequiado con una escena que involucra a una tortuga bailando a través de la pantalla y luego el juego pasa al siguiente nivel.

meta.name: Serpentine
meta.desc: In Serpentine you control a multi-segmented snake in a maze; your goal is to survive and earn as many points as possible. At the beginning of each level, three enemy snakes will also enter the maze. To complete the level, you need to eat all of the enemy snakes. If an enemy snake has more segments than your snake, you can only eat segments that form the tail of the snake; a collision with the head is lethal! Each time you eat a segment, the enemy snake will become smaller until eventually you can devour it completely.

meta.name: Shamus
meta.desc: Infiltrate the lair of the elusive Shadow, shoot and sneak your way through his army of robotic minions, and hunt him down before he does the same to you. Starring in the titular role of Shamus, you will have to find your way through over 120 rooms in this cross between Berzerk's "robots in a maze" action and Adventure's exploration of a predefined game world.

meta.name: Speed Math & Bingo Math
meta.desc: Speed Math / Bingo Math is a collection of two educational math games. The game helps improve addition, subtraction, multiplication and division skills. Points are awarded based on speed and math problems become more difficult the higher the current score is. The level of difficulty automatically adapts to the player's ability.

meta.name: Star Post
meta.desc: Eres el único guardián de un puesto avanzado en una parte distante de la galaxia y estás bajo ataque. Alienígenas de varias clases están cayendo hacia ti, y debes rotar y disparar tu rayo láser para destruirlos antes de que golpeen tu base. Además de los alienígenas que caen más lentamente, hay un "súperalienígena" ocasional que vuela en una trayectoria helicoidal parpadeante antes de golpearte. Un total de 8 golpes a tu base durante una sola oleada destruirán tu base, terminando tu juego. Las oleadas sucesivas consisten en más alienígenas y más rápidos, hasta que finalmente eres superado.

meta.name: Story Machine
meta.desc: Story Machine is a product aimed at children for teaching language skills.nnnnnnThe product contains animations assigned to key nouns, and verbs. By typing phrases such as "The Girl Jumps Over the Flower" will show the player an animation of a girl jumping over a flower. Through this method, players are able to create short "stories" of about 40 words long and have the computer animate them. These stories are also limited to having 4 "actors" (animated noun objects) in each.

meta.name: Submarine Commander
meta.desc:
Your mission is to destroy all enemy merchant shipping in Mediterranean waters. You have Sonar to help you find them when you are submerged.
If you are attacked you can dive deep (not too deep, or the hull will crack) and try to dodge the depth-charges; then you can rise to periscope level for another attack on the convoy.
But check the instruments for your oxygen level, fuel, battery charge, depth under your keel, and watch out for enemy destroyer, or it may all end in disaster!

meta.name: Tank Atak
meta.desc: Tank Atak se juega de forma similar al juego arcade de Atari Battlezone, en el que controlas un tanque que debe conducir hacia la izquierda o hacia la derecha a través de un paisaje, disparando tanques enemigos y platillos voladores en el proceso. Tu tanque está equipado con un radar que puedes usar para ayudarte a localizarlos. Una vez que lo hagas, debes alinearlos en tu mira y disparar misiles una vez que estén dentro del alcance. Tardar demasiado resulta en que el parabrisas se rompa y la pérdida de una de tus tres vidas. Pierde todas tus vidas y el juego termina.

meta.name: Trashman
meta.desc: This is a Pacman-style maze game in which you control a garbage truck and try to collect all the trash pieces and bring them to the city dump. Collect all the trash pieces to advance to the next level. While collecting the trash pieces you must avoid the enemies, which kind of look like birds, maybe like you would find at the dump. There are 6 'trash can' power ups per level that allow you to catch the enemies for more points. (Just like how eating a power pill will allow you to eat the ghosts in Pacman). The game maze features wrap-arounds both at the sides and top to bottom.

meta.name: Type Attack
meta.desc:
A Space Invaders inspired typing game. Letters slowly descend from the sky, type them in order to destroy them. Any letter that is at the bottom of a column is a valid input; mistakenly inputting another drains energy.
There are 99 speeds (Anything above 80 requires a genetic mutation), and 39 lessons. These can include upper and lower case, symbols and special keys as options. Each lesson finishes with a sequence of words using the featured letters, to be input in as little time as possible, allowing for use of the delete key.
Score is based on WPM, letters destroyed, minus mistakes. There is a savable high score table plus you can save your game at any time. The package includes finger placement diagrams for all variants of the host platform.

meta.name: Radar Rat Race
meta.desc:
Radar Rat Race takes the gameplay of Rally X and puts it into a rodent context. You control a rat, who must grab all the pieces of cheese in a maze, and flee from all the other rats. Once you reach a barrier in the maze, you are automatically rotated, but you can always manually change direction.
There are red ones who chase after you, and black ones who are activated when you get close to them - both types kill you on contact. When they are close, you can activate a Star Screen to block them off.
The Radar of the title is on the right of the screen, and shows you where each piece of cheese is, although the actual maze is not illuminated, so your next snack might be further away than you think.

meta.name: AE
meta.desc:
A.E. es un juego inspirado en Space Invaders con una vista 3D.
En A.E., la tierra está siendo atacada por enjambres de alienígenas que lanzan bomba tras bomba, y tu trabajo es defender el planeta Tierra.
Controlas un cañón láser que se mueve horizontalmente en la parte inferior de la pantalla. ¡Para ganar puntos deberías disparar a todas las fuerzas alienígenas antes de que te disparen!
El juego se vuelve más desafiante cuando progresas, el enjambre alienígena se divide y te ataca desde varios lados.

meta.name: Adventureland
meta.desc:
Adventureland es la primera de las aventuras basadas en texto de Scott Adams. Mediante sencillos comandos de dos palabras, exploras un mundo encantado, resuelves puzles e intentas recuperar 13 tesoros perdidos.
La pantalla del juego se diferencia de la de otros juegos de aventuras en que está dividida en dos "ventanas": en la parte superior se muestra la descripción de la habitación, las salidas, etc., mientras que en la parte inferior se introducen comandos.

meta.name: Amidar
meta.desc:
Amidar es un juego tipo Pac-Man. El objetivo del juego es colorear los rectángulos que aparecen en la pantalla, evitando a los enemigos (Amidars). El juego ofrece tres saltos sobre los enemigos, para evitar situaciones comprometidas. Completar los rectángulos de las esquinas permite "cazar" a los enemigos.
El juego diferencia pantallas pares e impares:
- Impares: Se controla un gorila y los enemigos son soldados. Hay que acabar con todos los puntos. Los rectángulos se colorean cuando se han eliminado todos los puntos del rectángulo.
- Pares: Se controla una brocha y los enemigos son cerdos. Para colorear un rectángulo, hay que recorrer su perímetro en un solo recorrido.
- También existen pantallas de bonus.

meta.name: Ape Escape
meta.desc: El jugador controla a un pequeño personaje que se mueve lateralmente en la parte inferior de la pantalla y dispara verticalmente hacia arriba. Un gran gorila se sienta en la cima de un edificio alto en el centro de la pantalla. El gorila arroja ladrillos desde el tejado al mismo tiempo que los helicópteros lanzan bombas y roban ladrillos de los lados de la torre. El jugador comienza con 3 vidas y pierde una vida si es golpeado por escombros del edificio o fuego de helicóptero. A medida que se roban ladrillos, la torre comienza a caer. Si la torre cae demasiado, el gorila saltará y golpeará al jugador. Si el jugador es golpeado por escombros 3 veces, se acaba el juego.

meta.name: Apple Panic
meta.desc:
You control a digger, armed with his shovel, and you must kill your opponents - the evil legged apples.
Your character can only walk left/right and climb up/down the ladders - no jumping - and if the apples touch you, you'll lose.
To kill an apple you must dig a hole on the ground and wait for one of them to get stuck on it. Then you must hit it with your shovel to make it fall to the level below. The apples die if they fall deep enough. Depending on their color, they may require from 1 to 3-level falls, so you may have to dig several aligned holes. Besides, the deeper the fall, the higher you score.
Each level is timed so you must take out all the apples quickly, or you'll lose. If you're successful, the next levels will feature more and more enemies than the previous one.

meta.name: Arachnoid
meta.desc: Arachnoid is a fixed screen shoot 'em up where the player takes control of a spider that has to defend its eggs from hostile ants. The game is most similar to Centipede. The ants attack in rows, moving horizontally one line at a time until they get to the player who moves around in the lower sections of the screen. Unlike Centipede there are no obstacles when starting out, but as the player shoots his web at the ants a wall of webbing is created. These causes the ants to change their direction. In addition to ants there are gnats and flies that can carry ants and open up passages in the wall. There are also wasps that moves across the screen at times. The game goes on until the eggs hatch or they have all been taken by the ants. Once the eggs hatch the player moves on to a new and tougher level.

meta.name: Arcadia
meta.desc: Arcadia es un juego de disparos fijo al estilo Space Invaders que también toma elementos de Gorf y Galaxian para crear un juego de acción simple y rápido. El jugador controla una nave espacial mientras los alienígenas se desplazan y se mueven libremente por la pantalla hacia abajo. El juego consta de 12 niveles diferentes de alienígenas descendentes.

meta.name: Artillery Duel
meta.desc: En este juego para dos jugadores, cada jugador controla un cañón de artillería ubicado en un paisaje montañoso con el objetivo de destruir al otro jugador. Los jugadores se turnan para dispararse; en cada turno, tienes una cantidad limitada de tiempo en la que se puede configurar el ángulo del cañón y el nivel de pólvora para controlar la dirección y la distancia del disparo. Al decidir tu disparo, deberás tener en cuenta las condiciones actuales, que incluyen la velocidad/dirección del viento y cualquier montaña que pueda interponerse en tu camino. Destruir con éxito el cañón de tu oponente te otorgará un punto, y el primer jugador en alcanzar el número de puntos establecido gana la partida. Hay varios niveles de habilidad disponibles que establecen la cantidad de tiempo que tienes para realizar un disparo.

meta.name: Astroblitz
meta.desc: Un clon de Defender, excepto por el hecho de que no tienes que rescatar a nadie... simplemente dispara a todo en la pantalla y serás teletransportado automáticamente al siguiente nivel.

meta.name: Astroblitz

meta.name: Atlantis
meta.desc: ¡La ciudad perdida de la Atlántida está siendo atacada! Ola tras ola de naves Gorgon se acercan, cada una armada con armas capaces de destruir una parte de la ciudad. Estás a cargo de los puestos de mando en los límites de la ciudad y necesitas defenderla de los invasores. Las diversas naves Gorgon seguirán volando en la pantalla en cantidades variables y con diferentes patrones de vuelo. Al principio vuelan alto en el cielo, pero luego progresivamente más bajo. Si un enemigo llega lo suficientemente bajo antes de que lo destruyas, usará sus armas y destruirá uno de los edificios de la Atlántida. A medida que avanzas en el juego, la velocidad de las naves enemigas seguirá aumentando. El juego termina cuando todos los edificios restantes de la ciudad han sido destruidos.

meta.name: Attack of the Mutant Camels
meta.desc: El jugador controla una pequeña nave y tiene la tarea de matar los camellos amarillos gigantes antes de que lleguen a la base de operaciones, requiere de varias docenas de disparos. Los camellos pueden contraatacar disparando bolas de fuego por la boca. Si un camello llega a la base, se pierde el juego. Una vez que todos los camellos de un nivel mueren, el jugador tiene que sobrevivir a una secuencia de "hiperespacio" que requiere evitar los misiles de alta velocidad. Una vez completado con éxito, el siguiente nivel presenta una nueva ola de camellos, con un juego un poco más difícil.

meta.name: Avenger
meta.desc: Avenger es un clon de Space Invaders para el Commodore VIC-20. Cartucho con número de catálogo VIC-1901.

meta.name: Bandits
meta.desc: Tu trabajo es custodiar los suministros en la base lunar. Bandidos de varios tipos llegan en oleadas y descienden, tratando de apoderarse de los bienes. Armado con un cañón láser móvil y algo de escudo, obtienes puntos al hacer explotar a los bandidos. Bandits tiene 28 niveles de juego. Comienzas con 5 naves y adquieres una nave extra por cada 5,000 puntos. El juego es similar a Space Invaders.

meta.name: Black Hole
meta.desc: Tu nave espacial ha sido atrapada por la atracción gravitacional de un agujero negro. Puedes rotar 360 grados, volar hacia adelante y disparar tus cañones, pero la atracción gravitacional del agujero negro continuará atrayéndote hacia el centro de la pantalla y la muerte. El jugador obtiene puntos por disparar a las rocas espaciales que flotan en la pantalla. El jugador comienza con 3 vidas.

meta.name: Buck Rogers : Planet Of Zoom
meta.desc: Buck Rogers: Planet of Zoom es una carrera de obstáculos de ciencia ficción para un solo jugador, donde el jugador controla la nave espacial de Buck Rogers y debe guiarla a través de múltiples pares de pilones a lo largo del juego. Controlar la nave implica desplazarse lateralmente a izquierda o derecha, detenerse, avanzar (y más rápido) y retroceder/frenar (y más lento). Además, la nave espacial también puede disparar su arma para liberar un par de rayos de energía.

meta.name: Bug Crusher
meta.desc: The player controls a small spaceship that can move in all directions, and attempts to destroy bugs that appear on the screen by running into them. The player is safe when in the 3 bunkers at the edge of the screen, but when they exit, they are continuously chased by a red enemy who steals the player's limited fuel. Other enemies scroll continuously across the screen, and if the player hits them or runs out of fuel, they lose a life. The player can activate temporary invulnerability at the cost of fuel. The player starts with 5 lives, and it's game over when all are lost.

meta.name: Cannonball Blitz
meta.desc: The player has to reach the flag on the top. The guard sends the cannonballs down, so you must jump over them. Cannonballs roll on the floors which have hatches, that open randomly. Also cannonballs fall on the swings, so you have to use them for climbing to the upper floor. Finally you must catch the balloon to make your way up to the flag and to the next level. Moving options available are up, down, left, right and jump.

meta.name: Capture the Flag
meta.desc:
The player can choose to be an invader or a defender. The invader must find a way to exit the labyrinth through one of two doors, beyond which lies the flag. Each successful flag capture scores 1 point and resets the maze for another round. The defender can score points by capturing the invader, which is simply done by running into him, thus preventing the invader from reaching the flag.
The two flags (or "doors" as the game calls them) are represented by flashing walls, and when the players see each other they are represented as blue or green moving walls. The music changes dynamically and becomes more intense when the invader and defender are close to each other. After a successful capture of either the flag or the invader, a new labyrinth is randomly generated.

meta.name: Catcha Snatcha
meta.desc:
In Catcha Snatch, the player takes the role of the store detective Barney Bootlace. He walks around the store, which is represented with one top-down screen, to do his job: guiding lost children back to their mom, bringing lost items to the lost property office, busting shoplifters and rushing bombs out of the door. Practically this boils down to touching the item/person in question and walking to the destination.
Barney's success is measured by his manager's approval from 0 to 99%. The approval rises when Barney manages to handle an issue correctly and decreases when he misses something. If 99% is reached, Barney is promoted to the next level (and a higher difficulty) - however, a demotion and a written warning follows directly after falling to 0%. After three warnings the game is over, but one warning is removed for advancing two levels.

meta.name: Cave-In
meta.desc:
After many years of futility, your search is over!
You have found the kingdom of meese.
Power and riches shall soon be yours!
But remember the legend of meese.
Are there really creature called "Meese-Kites"? Are the "magic lips" still hidden below? Are you brave enough to find out ...

meta.name: Centipede
meta.desc:
In Centipede, the player is trapped in the Enchanted Forest. Armed with only a magic wand to ward off the forest's insect denizens, all of which are attacking the player in continuous waves.
The player must use the magic wand to shoot sparks at approaching insects to score points by pressing the controller button. Holding down the controller button will set the wand to rapid-fire shots. If the player is bitten by an insect, the player will be temporarily paralyzed and lose one of the three starting magic wands.

meta.name: Choplifter
meta.desc:
En Choplifter, el jugador asume el papel de piloto de helicóptero de combate. El jugador tiene que salvar a los rehenes retenidos en barracones en territorio del malvado Imperio Bungeling. El jugador debe recoger a los rehenes y transportarlos de forma segura al edificio cercano del Servicio Postal de EE. UU.
El helicóptero puede moverse en tres direcciones: izquierda, derecha o hacia adelante (frente al jugador). Puede disparar a los enemigos en cualquiera de estas direcciones y no es necesario que vuele en la misma dirección a la que se enfrenta. El modo orientado hacia adelante se usa principalmente para disparar tanques. El jugador debe tener cuidado de proteger a los rehenes del fuego enemigo y evitar matarlos con fuego amigo.

meta.name: Chuck Norris Superkicks
meta.desc: In this action game you play the part of Chuck Norris on a quest to reach a monastery where an important leader is kept hostage. The game consists of several different screens: when beginning and between fights you will see a view of the path that leads to the monastery. Walking along the path, you will encounter numerous enemies. When fighting, the view switches to a close up of your current location. By pressing the joystick button and moving the joystick in one of four directions you can perform various kicks, punches, and blocks. The enemies you encounter are varied, and some can only be defeated by certain moves. The path you walk along will occasionally split up into two or more choices; when this happens, only one choice is correct and the others are dead ends. If you choose incorrectly, you'll have to back track a bit and try again.

meta.name: Computer War
meta.desc: It's thermonuclear war! Break the computer code to launch your missiles, then guide your interceptors before enemy missiles converge with your cities. This is a game in two parts. The first part plays a lot like a sliding block puzzle. You are given a figure in a 3 x 3 grid to match. Using the joystick and fire button, you rotate pieces in a larger grid to try to match the smaller figure. If you do that, you can select a missile launch site. Eventually, the enemy will launch its own missiles. You position your crosshair at the radar dot for the enemy missile, and can then launch an intercepter. This part of the game is more action-oriented as you "fly" your intercepter to take down the enemy nuke.

meta.name: Congo Bongo
meta.desc: El jugador asume el papel de un explorador pelirrojo de safari que intenta atrapar a un simio llamado "Bongo". El explorador busca a Bongo para vengarse de una broma en la que Bongo prendió fuego a la tienda del cazador. Debe perseguir al simio a través de cuatro pantallas diferentes, con el objetivo de pasar de la esquina inferior izquierda a la esquina superior derecha de cada pantalla. Debe superar obstáculos como la caída de cocos, la carga de rinocerontes y evitar caídas al agua.

meta.name: Cosmic Cruncher
meta.desc: Manoeuvre your "Cosmic Cruncher" through the Milky Way and "crunch" all the pulsars in each part of the galaxy. 11 challenging levels of play... Over 300 colour/maze combinations. Another exciting Commodore arcade-style action game!

meta.name: Cosmic Cruncher
meta.desc: Manoeuvre your "Cosmic Cruncher" through the Milky Way and "crunch" all the pulsars in each part of the galaxy. 11 challenging levels of play... Over 300 colour/maze combinations. Another exciting Commodore arcade-style action game!
