meta.name: Cosmic Jailbreak
meta.desc: Aliens, ovnis e insectos espaciales intentan liberar a los prisioneros de la Cárcel Cósmica... Tú evitas el intento de escape y construyes tus propias bases láser o nuestra Tierra estará condenada... ¡Gráficos emocionantes hacen de este un juego para amantes del espacio de todas las edades!

meta.name: Count, The
meta.desc: You awaken in a sealed wing of the Count's Transylvanian castle, seemingly restrictive but yielding further avenues of secret passages and unexpected exits to the intrepid and timely explorer. Over the course of a few days you need to cultivate a familiarity with the layout of the castle and the nocturnal activities of its primary resident, who chooses to make midnight snacks of you rather than a main course. An unpredictable day/night cycle forces your hand, necessitating finding a reliable light source and some means of staying awake -- or else you awaken the next morning back in bed, your possessions pilfered by the kleptomaniacal creature of the night and your neck boasting irritated bite marks. Each day you must incrementally approach your goal of overcoming the Count, lest you wind up as one more dried-out apéritif.

meta.name: Creepy Corridors
meta.desc: Creepy Corridors is a maze game similar to Wizard of Wor, adventurer Sierra Smith has entered the catacombs of Creepy Corridors in search for treasures. The mazes are full of riches but there are also lots of creatures that will do all they can to protect it. That's not enough to stop this adventurer though and it's up to the player to help him out. Each level consists of four diamonds that the player has to pick up. At the same time he has to avoid getting killed by the monsters that wander around the corridors. To his help he has a gun that he can use to shoot the creatures as they get close. Once all the diamonds have been picked up, an exit will open up that takes the player to the next level. The exit will also open when the player has killed all the monsters before collecting the diamonds. The player has four lives at the start of the game and each time he collects all the diamonds of a level he earns an extra one. More and tougher enemies are encountered as the player progresses through the levels.

meta.name: Crossfire
meta.desc:
In this adaptation of the arcade game Targ your job is to defend your city from marauding alien beasts. You can simultaneously maneuver your craft and shoot in four directions while patrolling the regular grid of streets - the enemy has surrounded your city block, and attacks are coming in from all sides as the aliens swarm in with all guns blazing. To survive, you'll have to blast your way out by darting in and out of the line of fire and taking down the assailants with your own volleys: once they're all eliminated, you go forth to the next level, to face yet another wave.
Ammunition is limited, and from time to time you'll have to restock by picking up a fresh supply. Every level contains four bonus crystals: as time goes by, they emerge one-by-one to be picked up, and each is worth twice as much as the last. The game starts you off with three ships, though you get a fresh one for every 5000 points you score.

meta.name: Cyclon
meta.desc: Cyclon es un juego de reflejos de temática espacial similar a Space Zap de Midway. El objetivo del juego es sobrevivir el mayor tiempo posible defendiendo tu base estelar de cruceros estelares enemigos y satélites mortales. El juego tiene 99 niveles de dificultad, y el jugador puede comenzar en cualquier nivel del 0 al 10. El jugador comienza el juego con tres bases y ganará una adicional cada vez que se complete un nivel. Además, cualquier energía extra restante al final de cada ronda se convertirá en puntos extra. Cuando se han perdido todas las bases estelares del jugador, el juego termina.

meta.name: Deadly Duck
meta.desc: En Deadly Duck, el jugador controla al personaje principal (el pato) que debe disparar sus "balas de pico" a los cangrejos, los ladrillos que estos sueltan y las libélulas. Cada nivel comienza con ocho cangrejos. Los cangrejos agarran ladrillos de los lados e intentan dejarlos caer sobre el pato controlado por el jugador. Es posible disparar a los cangrejos y a los ladrillos mientras caen, pero si un ladrillo cae sobre el pato, este muere. Cuando un ladrillo cae en un lugar vacío, permanecerá en el estanque por un momento, impidiendo que el pato se mueva horizontalmente.

meta.name: Deadly Skies
meta.desc: En Deadly Skies vuelas un helicóptero de ataque contra una serie de instalaciones militares y emplazamientos de misiles antiaéreos. Los controles del joystick te permiten mover tu helicóptero para seguir a los objetivos de abajo o para evitar las crecientes y rápidas andanadas de fuego que te rodean. Los obstáculos que debes superar son asteroides, bombas inteligentes, misiles antiaéreos e incluso OVNIs que trabajan arduamente para destruirte porque se te ha asignado la tarea de eliminar sus bases de misiles.

meta.name: Defender
meta.desc:
Defender put players in charge of a ship sent to protect mankind from wave after wave of attacking alien forces.
Armed with smart bombs and the ability to use hyperspace to move quickly around the planet, the player ship must fight against Bombers, Pods, Swarmers, Baiters, and Landers - that can capture the humanoids and transform them into deadly and relentless Mutants. Fail to save the humanoids from freefall or Mutant transformation, and the planet is destroyed.

meta.name: Demon Attack
meta.desc:
Marooned on the ice planet Krybor, you watch legions of eerie creatures scream overhead.
They hover ominously.
Attack and destroy them - or be destroyed!
Armed with your Laser Cannon, you confront the ultimate challenge: Survive!

meta.name: Demon Attack
meta.desc:
Marooned on the ice planet Krybor, you watch legions of eerie creatures scream overhead.
They hover ominously.
Attack and destroy them - or be destroyed!
Armed with your Laser Cannon, you confront the ultimate challenge: Survive!

meta.name: Dig Dug
meta.desc:
En Dig Dug, libra una guerra subterránea con tu fiel arpón. Tendrás que derrotar al duro Pooka y al feroz Fygar para avanzar al siguiente nivel.
Haz explotar a tus enemigos para que revienten o lánzales rocas. Conseguirás puntos por deshacerte de ellos o por recoger objetos de bonificación.
Este juego clásico es a la vez un juego de acción arcade de la vieja escuela y un juego de estrategia. ¡Atrae a tus enemigos hacia donde quieras que estén y aplástalos con las rocas!

meta.name: Dot Gobbler
meta.desc: Try to gobble up the dots before the hungry ghosts catch you. Gobble one of the large power dots for added strength, and it's your turn to chase the ghouls for extra bonus points. The player starts with 3 lives, and 1 is lost if a ghost catches them. Gobble all the dots, and move on to the next level.

meta.name: Dot Gobbler
meta.desc: Try to gobble up the dots before the hungry ghosts catch you. Gobble one of the large power dots for added strength, and it's your turn to chase the ghouls for extra bonus points. The player starts with 3 lives, and 1 is lost if a ghost catches them. Gobble all the dots, and move on to the next level.

meta.name: Dragonfire
meta.desc: ¡Los tesoros del rey han sido robados! Como joven y audaz príncipe, tu objetivo es recuperarlos a todos. Los tesoros se guardan en diferentes castillos, cada uno custodiado por un dragón de fuego. Cada nivel del juego tiene dos partes, primero tienes que cruzar el puente levadizo del castillo. ¡Tendrás que saltar y esquivar las bolas de fuego de los dragones y evitar las flechas voladoras para llegar al otro lado! En la segunda parte, tienes que recoger todos los tesoros de la pantalla y ponerlos en un lugar seguro mientras evitas al dragón que corre por la parte inferior de la pantalla. Los dragones de cada nivel tienen diferentes patrones de movimiento y disparo, y a medida que avanzan los niveles se vuelven más rápidos y complicados.

meta.name: Droids
meta.desc:
In the vast, starless void beyond the Mnemos Nebula, your desperate struggle has restored some measure of control after the devastating effects of an ion storm. Just creeping along at sublight speed, you discover that your crew of droids has suffered phase inversion to their programming elements. Once friendly, helpful, and benign, they have become an all too real nemesis to your safety and control of the ship.
The player controls a small character who can move in the cardinal directions, and fire in the direction they are facing. When a droid is shot, it dematerializes, and is teleported back to its cubicle. The goal is to repair, and then reactivate all of the ship's systems. The player does this by touching a system, and then returning to the elevator shaft on the left of the screen to repower, and they touch the system again. The player has 3 minutes to reactivate all systems and move to a more challenging level with more or faster moving droids.

meta.name: Face Maker
meta.desc:
Everyone's mothers always say "Don't make those faces! They'll stay like that!" But now you have the chance to make the silliest looking faces anyone's ever seen!
Choose from a wide assortment of eyes, ears, noses, and mouths. Then make your newly created faces blink, wiggle their ears, wink, or razz you. You can even play a "Simon Says.." type game where your face will do some kind of action and you have to follow along!

meta.name: Face Maker
meta.desc:
Everyone's mothers always say "Don't make those faces! They'll stay like that!" But now you have the chance to make the silliest looking faces anyone's ever seen!
Choose from a wide assortment of eyes, ears, noses, and mouths. Then make your newly created faces blink, wiggle their ears, wink, or razz you. You can even play a "Simon Says.." type game where your face will do some kind of action and you have to follow along!

meta.name: Fast Eddie
meta.desc:
As Fast Eddie, you must go from floor to floor, collecting prizes.
Up to two prizes will be on the screen at any one time on any floor but the top one. There are a max of ten prizes per screen. On each floor, a Sneaker stands or roams back and forth. You move to another floor or jump to avoid the Sneakers. On the top floor is High-Top, the tallest Sneaker.
You have to get at least nine prizes. After you get the ninth, High-Top will be low enough to jump over. You then jump over him to get the key above him. Then it is on to the the next screen.
You get ten points for the first prize, twenty for the second, and so on up to ninety points for prizes nine and ten. You don't HAVE to get the tenth prize unless you want the extra ninety points.
After every screen, you get an extra Eddie; up to a maximum of three in reserve.

meta.name: Frogger
meta.desc:
Your task in this arcade game is to guide a frog across a treacherous road and river, and to safety at the top of the screen. Both these sections are fraught with a variety of hazards, each of which will kill the frog and cost you a life if contact is made.
The road is full of cars and trucks, at variable speeds. The river water itself is fatal, as are the snakes which hover within on later levels. Frogger must use the arrangement of logs, turtles (which are only there for a short time) and alligators (but stay away from their faces), and then jump into one of the open home-cells, ideally one containing a fly for extra points. Once all holes have been filled, you move onto the next, harder, level.

meta.name: Fun with Music
meta.desc: The player can review or create their own music selection by setting tempo, value, and notes on a music graph. After they've created their musical composition, they can enter a game where they move a conductor vertically, as they try to follow the horizontally scrolling notes on the screen. If they miss too many notes, or are caught by a chasing dog, they lose a life.

meta.name: Galaxian
meta.desc:
Galaxian is a shoot 'em up where the player is at the bottom of the screen and controls a spaceship called "Galaxip" with the aim of eliminating aliens. The enemies appear in formation at the top of the screen with two escort ships. The player moves left and right to aim at an alien, then shoots a bullet and the alien he meets is killed. The aliens are classified as drones, emissaries, hornets, and commanders, with those higher up the screen scoring more points if destroyed. At set intervals, an enemy moves towards you on the screen and escorts a bomber.The Galaxip can only fire a single shot on the screen and must wait until it reaches the top before it can fire another.
The enemy's movement increases as the game progresses along with the number of shots the enemies fire.

meta.name: Garden Wars
meta.desc: Garden Wars es un shooter de laberinto de 8 direcciones y pantalla única de ritmo rápido, similar a Berzerk. ¿Tu objetivo? Ganar tantos puntos como sea posible disparando y recolectando cosas en un laberinto estático de pantalla fija. Sin embargo, el juego es original debido a la variedad de elementos en pantalla. Hay algunos monstruos a los que debes disparar y que te matarán. Hay elementos intermitentes que debes recoger (solo por puntos); si les disparas accidentalmente (lo que sucederá debido a la velocidad del juego), desaparecerán y reaparecerán en otro lugar.

meta.name: Garden Wars
meta.desc: Garden Wars es un shooter de laberinto de 8 direcciones y pantalla única de ritmo rápido, similar a Berzerk. ¿Tu objetivo? Ganar tantos puntos como sea posible disparando y recolectando cosas en un laberinto estático de pantalla fija. Sin embargo, el juego es original debido a la variedad de elementos en pantalla. Hay algunos monstruos a los que debes disparar y que te matarán. Hay elementos intermitentes que debes recoger (solo por puntos); si les disparas accidentalmente (lo que sucederá debido a la velocidad del juego), desaparecerán y reaparecerán en otro lugar.

meta.name: Ghost Manor
meta.desc: Your friend is trapped inside Ghost Manor! There are five different screens you need to get past before you can rescue your friend from the top floor of the manor. The game begins in the graveyard outside the manor; here you play tag with a friendly rainbow ghost or skeleton which will supply you with spears you can fire at enemies. In the second screen, you approach the guarded entrance of the manor. You need to shoot all of the enemies blocking the entrance. The third and fourth screens take place inside the manor. There is a moving wall on each of these floors which is deadly to the touch, so be careful! The final screen is the top floor of the manor where your friend is being held captive. Dracula guards this floor, and using the crosses you collected earlier you need to repel him into a prison and free your friend. You must complete all of this in four minutes or less! You can play the game as either a boy or a girl, and four different skill levels are available.

meta.name: Gold Fever
meta.desc: Gold Fever! is an action game with platform elements in which the player controls a miner searching for gold. At the beginning of the game the miner is at the uppermost tiers of the mine. Scattered around the five levels of the mine are little piles of gold. The goal is to move towards them and pick them up. To move the miner safely from level to level the player steers him up or down the vertical shafts in the floors. There are complications, such as runaway ore carts, which interfere with the miner's progress by knocking him down. Three collisions and the player is out of miners, ending the game. The miner will be able to jump over the obstructions if the player times the jumps perfectly. This adds from 30 to 40 points to the player's score. If the miner can cross a chasm by running across a boxcar, he earns another 20 points.

meta.name: Gorf
meta.desc: El jugador controla una nave espacial que puede moverse a izquierda, derecha, arriba y abajo alrededor del tercio inferior de la pantalla. La nave puede disparar un solo proyectil (llamado "láser de quark" en este juego), que viaja verticalmente hacia la parte superior de la pantalla. A diferencia de juegos similares, donde el jugador no puede volver a disparar hasta que el proyectil existente haya desaparecido, el jugador puede elegir disparar otro proyectil en cualquier momento; si el proyectil anterior todavía está en pantalla, este desaparece.

meta.name: Gridrunner
meta.desc: El juego es similar al juego de Atari Centipede, en el que el jugador controla una nave verde, la Gridrunner, en la parte inferior y dispara a los enemigos que descienden en zigzag desde la parte superior. El jugador también debe evitar los pulsos emitidos por los X-Y zappers que patrullan los bordes de la cuadrícula. El juego tiene veinte oleadas de enemigos para completar.

meta.name: Gridrunner
meta.desc: El juego es similar al juego de Atari Centipede, en el que el jugador controla una nave verde, la Gridrunner, en la parte inferior y dispara a los enemigos que descienden en zigzag desde la parte superior. El jugador también debe evitar los pulsos emitidos por los X-Y zappers que patrullan los bordes de la cuadrícula. El juego tiene veinte oleadas de enemigos para completar.

meta.name: In The Chips
meta.desc:
A business simulator which puts you in control of a Silicon Valley software firm: you've invested $100,000 in cash in the business, and now you get to call the shots. Your goal is to expand your share of the computer software market while striving against a competing company (run by the computer or by another human player).
Each turn represents a fiscal quarter, and both companies set up a business strategy. This is done by walking your character between the company's various buildings: at R&D, development budget is assigned for up to five potential products (games, judging by their titles). Stock levels are set at Manufacturing, and retail prices are adjusted in the Sales office. Then there's Advertising, which will (literally) reach out its hand for budget.

meta.name: Jawbreaker II
meta.desc:
You have a screen with five horizontal levels. There are dots, candies, if you will, on each level. You must eat all the candies to get a teeth brushing and advance to the next, harder, level. Also on each level are happy faces. They are happy to knock your teeth out, which they will do if you touch them. This will lose you a life. When all lives are lost, the game is over.
On occasion, a lollipop will appear in the center of the maze. This grants extra points. On the four corners are special dots that, when eaten, will change the color of the maze, allowing you to eat the happy faces for a short time. The maze color will change again, briefly, before returning to normal, as a warning. To move from level to level, there are moving openings on the levels. Be careful not to get trapped with a happy face with no way out.

meta.name: Jawbreaker II
meta.desc:
You have a screen with five horizontal levels. There are dots, candies, if you will, on each level. You must eat all the candies to get a teeth brushing and advance to the next, harder, level. Also on each level are happy faces. They are happy to knock your teeth out, which they will do if you touch them. This will lose you a life. When all lives are lost, the game is over.
On occasion, a lollipop will appear in the center of the maze. This grants extra points. On the four corners are special dots that, when eaten, will change the color of the maze, allowing you to eat the happy faces for a short time. The maze color will change again, briefly, before returning to normal, as a warning. To move from level to level, there are moving openings on the levels. Be careful not to get trapped with a happy face with no way out.

meta.name: Jungle Hunt
meta.desc:
Jungle Hunt cuenta con cuatro aventuras únicas, cada una de las cuales se repite con dificultad creciente. Si no sobrevives a estas aventuras, no sólo perderás tu vida, sino también la de la encantadora Penélope, ¡que ha sido capturada por caníbales!
La primera parte pone a prueba tus habilidades de Tarzán: ¿puedes balancearte sobre las lianas sin precipitarte al vacío? La segunda parte te enfrenta a una banda de repugnantes cocodrilos en un caudaloso río. Afortunadamente, tienes un cuchillo para defenderte. En la tercera parte, tendrás que enfrentarte a rocas de diferentes tamaños. Una vez superados todos estos peligros, te queda enfrentarte al temible caníbal, armado con una temible lanza. ¿Serás capaz de derrotarlo y salvar a la bella Penélope?
meta.genre: Plataformas / Corre y Salta con desplazamiento

meta.name: K-razy Antiks
meta.desc: The player controls a white ant, who must infiltrate an enemy ant hill to defeat the other 3 ants. The player and enemy ants have the ability to lay eggs, and if they are killed, they will rehatch with a new egg. If the player is killed when no viable egg is available, it is game over. The goal is to have all 3 enemy ants killed by environmental dangers, while also eliminating the eggs they lay, so that they don't respawn.

meta.name: K-Star Patrol
meta.desc: El objetivo es guiar al escuadrón de 8 naves estelares del jugador a través de 10 sectores bajo control alienígena. El jugador controla una pequeña nave que se mueve verticalmente a la izquierda de la pantalla y dispara hacia la derecha.

meta.name: Kindercomp
meta.desc:
An early learning game for kids aged 3-8. This program is a collection of 6 learning games:
Draw, Scribble, Names, Sequence, Letters and Match.

Rocks, cacti, scorpions, and other obstacles should be avoided or you'll crash and lose valuable time. Next you'll race a winding path uphill through the woods. This section has a top down view, and you'll lose time if you wander off the track or crash into obstacles. The final segment of the race takes place on the beach with a side scrolling point of view. Various obstacles and other racers will all get in your way here! If you crash too many times, or take too long the game will be over.

meta.name: Mountain King
meta.desc: Deep within a multi platformed diamond mine is a valuable crown. Your goal is to locate and retrieve the crown, then make it to the top of the mine alive! There are several steps that need to be completed before you can retrieve the crown. First you need to collect enough diamonds to earn 1,000 points. After you have enough points, you need to locate the flame spirit which is hidden somewhere within the mine. Since the mine is rather dark, you carry a flashlight with you which can be used to locate objects (such as treasure chests full of diamonds and the flame spirit.) Once you have the flame spirit, you need to find the entrance to the temple the crown is in. Offer the flame spirit to the skull spirit guarding the entrance, and you can get in and take the crown. Once you have the crown, you need to make it to the top of the mine before time runs out. To make this task more challenging, numerous cave bats fly around which can steal the crown. If this happens, you need to begin again!

meta.name: Ms. Pac-Man
meta.desc:
In 1982, a sequel to Pac-Man was introduced in the form of his girlfriend, Ms. Pac-Man. This sequel continued on the original gameplay, but added new features to keep the title fresh.
Ms. Pac-Man attempts to clear four various and challenging mazes filled with dots and ever-moving bouncing fruit while avoiding Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Sue. One touch from any of these ghosts means a loss of life for Ms. Pac-Man.
Ms. Pac-Man can turn the tables on her pursuers by eating one of the four Energizers located within the maze. During this time, the ghosts turn blue, and Ms. Pac-Man can eat them for bonus points. The Energizer power only lasts for a limited amount of time, as the ghost's eyes float back to their center box, and regenerate to chase after Ms. Pac-Man again.
Survive a few rounds of gameplay, and the player will be treated to humorous intermissions showing the growing romantic relationship between Pac-Man and Ms. Pac-Man, leading all the way up to the arrival of "Junior".

meta.name: Mutant Herd
meta.desc:
Mutant Herd starts like an usual arcade game: a powerhouse in the middle screen, monsters which want to destroy it and two laser beams (one horizontally and one vertically) at the player's disposal. Those laser beams act more like moveable walls because they don't destroy monsters, but push them back. They disappear for good when they are pushed outside the screen, but retaliation swiftly comes from the other side. The end goal is to destroy the monster queen's burrow to stop the attacks.
Besides monsters, there is also a friendly creature on the screen: the monster slayer. It must be guided towards the burrow entrances with the laser beams. Then the screen changes to a side view: a big ladder which leads to eight horizontal levels. The player controls the monster slayer directly towards the lower floor and needs to plant a bomb to destroy five monster eggs while avoiding falling rocks and the monster queen which moves around the levels.

There are red ones who chase after you, and black ones who are activated when you get close to them - both types kill you on contact. When they are close, you can activate a Star Screen to block them off.
The Radar of the title is on the right of the screen, and shows you where each piece of cheese is, although the actual maze is not illuminated, so your next snack might be further away than you think.

meta.desc: The goal is to wake up Count Cristo, who is lying in a coffin at the starting location in the game. In order to do so, the player needs to obtain certain items, which requires overcoming certain obstacles, such as an exploding test tubes and a doorway that's too small to pass through normally.

meta.name: Wacky Waiters
meta.desc:
In Wacky Waiters you control a waiter that has to get from one end of the screen to the other to deliver drinks to the beckoning customers waiting there. Each level consists of platforms and elevators and you have to use the elevators to move across the level and up/down platforms.
If you drop into one of the elevator shafts or if the time runs out you are fired. Get fired three times and it's Game Over.

meta.name: A World at War
meta.desc: A World at War is a simple war strategy game from Swedish based Handic Software.  You build bases, scan the enemies land for bases, then attack with your missiles.  You need to wipe out their bases and reduce the population.  It's a mix of Battleship and WarGames where you have to launch missiles at specific coordinates and if properly placed the missile will take out surrounding bases.  Decrease your enemies population enough, they will surrender.
